objective: Independently audit adversarial assurance, recovery, supply-chain and release evidence required for SKELETON_GREEN and a bounded offline conditional RC without conflating them with 72-hour soak or 14-day production approval.
executable_blocker: The Bridge has extensive unit and vertical evidence, but no current canonical gate distinguishes executable RC prerequisites from later soak and production requirements; Agent 0 needs a hostile read-only gap audit before release-stage authority is issued.
required_output: adversarial evidence matrix for admission ledger CAS execution validation and reference vertical
missing crash replay reboot restore rollback supply-chain license packaging and release evidence
separate prerequisite sets for conditional offline RC 72-hour soak MVP and 14-day production approval
exact proposed assurance stage write-sets and acceptance commands
explicit severity and candidate-timer reset rules
acceptance_commands: test exact HEAD and upstream equal 39bfa687be5b90a66671abe1ef8689b8a08142c4
map every release claim to exact source test and receipt evidence or mark missing
return read-only assurance audit to Agent 0 with no repository diff
rollback: Delete the clean read-only audit branch/worktree. No repository or external state is mutated.
